summary: Comprehensive testing of Speakking Voice Translation Coach completed successfully. All core voice features working including login, lesson sessions, voice mode toggle, TTS, and AI chat with Turkish sentences.
passed_tests: AI chat provides Turkish sentences for translation
Voice chat endpoint /api/voice/chat exists and responds
Play button on AI messages works
Session info and corrections panels visible
All backend APIs return 200 status codes
AI responses include Turkish content for translation practice
